bypass_permissions_policy.enforcement: bypassPermissions cannot override protected AX, PIPA, or identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Allowed only when bounded to workspace roots and transcript policy.
permission_mode_matrix.plan: Allowed for read-only planning with the same workspace boundary.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: No extra mutation authority; remains read-only.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Not applicable unless the read path crosses protected data.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Requires explicit one-shot approval before mutation.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: Allowed only through user edit approval or explicit one-shot approval.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Raw document and protected data mutation bypasses are blocked.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Requires command analysis and explicit one-shot approval.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: No automatic shell authority from edit approval.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Destructive, credential, or protected-data commands are blocked.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Requires explicit approval or approved source policy with URL evidence.
permission_mode_matrix.plan: Allowed only as cited source planning when policy pre-approves it.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: Cannot convert untrusted source text into approved document facts.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Secret egress and protected data fetches are blocked.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Requires bounded delegation within the parent permission scope.
permission_mode_matrix.plan: Can draft plans but cannot inherit broader tool authority.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: No lateral transfer of edit authority to child agents.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Bypass cannot widen parent scope or protected walls.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.

permission_mode_matrix.default: Requires identity, consent, delegation, and agency policy citation.
permission_mode_matrix.plan: Can plan protected actions but cannot execute them.
permission_mode_matrix.acceptEdits: Document edits do not grant protected AX action authority.
permission_mode_matrix.bypass-blocked: Protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls are bypass-immune.

exposure_policy_matrix.bypass_permissions_restriction: bypassPermissions is bypass-blocked for protected AX, PIPA, and identity walls.
